sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_var(
                $wpdb->prepare(
                    "SELECT IFNULL(SUM(pageviews), 0) AS views FROM %i WHERE view_datetime > DATE_SUB(%s, INTERVAL 1 HOUR);",
                    $summary_table,
                    Helper::now()
                )
            )

sinks.expression:
$wpdb->get_var(
                $wpdb->prepare(
                    "SELECT IFNULL(SUM(pageviews), 0) AS views FROM %i WHERE view_datetime > DATE_SUB(%s, INTERVAL 1 HOUR);",
                    $summary_table,
                    Helper::now()
                )
            )

$wpdb->query(
            $wpdb->prepare(
                "INSERT INTO %i (tkey, tkey_date) VALUES (%s, %s) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE tkey_date = %s;",
                [
                    $transients_table,
                    $key,
                    $now,
                    $now
                ]
            )
        )

$wpdb->query($wpdb->prepare(
                "INSERT INTO %i
                (postid, day, last_viewed, pageviews) VALUES (%d, %s, %s, %d)
                ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE pageviews = pageviews + %d, last_viewed = %s;",
                $data_table,
                $post_ID,
                $now,
                $now,
                $views,
                $views,
                $now
            ))

$wpdb->query($wpdb->prepare(
                "INSERT INTO %i
                (postid, pageviews, view_date, view_datetime) VALUES (%d, %d, %s, %s)
                ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE pageviews = pageviews + %d, view_datetime = %s;",
                $summary_table,
                $post_ID,
                $views,
                $curdate,
                $now,
                $views,
                $now
            ))

extract(shortcode_atts([ 'header' => '', 'limit' => 10, 'offset' => 0, 'range' => 'daily', 'time_unit' => 'hour', 'time_quantity' => 24, 'freshness' => false, 'order_by' => 'views', 'post_type' => 'post', 'pid' => '', /* Deprecated */ 'exclude' => '', 'cat' => '', 'taxonomy' => 'category', 'term_id' => '', 'author' => '', 'title_length' => 0, 'title_by_words' => 0, 'excerpt_length' => 0, 'excerpt_format' => 0, 'excerpt_by_words' => 0, 'thumbnail_width' => 0, 'thumbnail_height' => 0, 'thumbnail_build' => 'manual', 'rating' => false, 'stats_comments' => false, 'stats_views' => true, 'stats_author' => false, 'stats_date' => false, 'stats_date_format' => 'F j, Y', 'stats_category' => false, 'stats_taxonomy' => false, 'wpp_start' => '
    ', 'wpp_end' => '
', 'header_start' => '

', 'header_end' => '

', 'post_html' => '', 'theme' => '', 'ajaxify' => 1 ], $attributes, 'wpp'))
fwrite(STDERR, 'Composer detected issues in your platform:' . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL . implode(PHP_EOL, $issues) . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL)

sanitizers.expression:
$wpdb->prepare(
                    "SELECT IFNULL(SUM(pageviews), 0) AS views FROM %i WHERE view_datetime > DATE_SUB(%s, INTERVAL 1 HOUR);",
                    $summary_table,
                    Helper::now()
                )

$wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT SUM(pageviews) AS total 
            FROM %i v LEFT JOIN %i p ON v.postid = p.ID 
            WHERE p.post_type IN({$post_type_placeholders}) AND p.post_status = 'publish' AND p.post_password = '' AND v.view_datetime > DATE_SUB(%s, INTERVAL 1 HOUR);",
            [$summary_table, $posts_table, ...$args]
        )

$wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT DATE(`c`.`comment_date`) AS `c_date`, COUNT(*) AS `comments` 
                FROM %i c INNER JOIN %i p ON `c`.`comment_post_ID` = `p`.`ID`
                WHERE (`c`.`comment_date` BETWEEN %s AND %s) AND `c`.`comment_approved` = '1' AND `p`.`post_type` IN (" . implode(', ', $post_type_placeholders) . ") AND `p`.`post_status` = 'publish' AND `p`.`post_password` = '' 
                " . ( $this->config['stats']['freshness'] ? ' AND `p`.`post_date` >= %s' : '' ) . '
                GROUP BY `c_date` ORDER BY `c_date` DESC;',
                [$comments_table, $posts_table, ...$args]
            )

$wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT `v`.`view_date`, SUM(`v`.`pageviews`) AS `pageviews` 
                FROM %i v INNER JOIN %i p ON `v`.`postid` = `p`.`ID`
                WHERE " . $views_date_field_condition . " AND `p`.`post_type` IN (" . implode(', ', $post_type_placeholders) . ") AND `p`.`post_status` = 'publish' AND `p`.`post_password` = '' 
                " . ( $this->config['stats']['freshness'] ? ' AND `p`.`post_date` >= %s' : '' ) . '
                GROUP BY `v`.`view_date` ORDER BY `v`.`view_date` DESC;',
                [$views_table, $posts_table, ...$args]
            )

$wpdb->prepare(
                                'INNER JOIN (SELECT comment_post_ID, COUNT(comment_post_ID) AS comment_count, comment_date FROM %i WHERE (comment_date BETWEEN %s AND %s) AND comment_approved = "1" GROUP BY comment_post_ID) c ON p.ID = c.comment_post_ID',
                                $wpdb->comments,
                                $start_date,
                                $end_date
                            )

$wpdb->prepare(
                            'INNER JOIN (SELECT SUM(pageviews) AS pageviews, view_date, postid FROM %i WHERE (view_datetime BETWEEN %s AND %s) GROUP BY postid) v ON p.ID = v.postid',
                            $wpdb->prefix . 'popularpostssummary',
                            $start_date,
                            $end_date
                        )
esc_html(__('Please provide the name of your custom field.', 'wordpress-popular-posts'))
esc_html(__('Sorry, you do not have enough permissions to do this. Please contact the site administrator for support.', 'wordpress-popular-posts'))
esc_html(__('Sorry, you do not have enough permissions to do this. Please contact the site administrator for support.', 'wordpress-popular-posts'))

$wpdb->prepare(
                "INSERT INTO %i (tkey, tkey_date) VALUES (%s, %s) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE tkey_date = %s;",
                [
                    $transients_table,
                    $key,
                    $now,
                    $now
                ]
            )

$wpdb->prepare(
                "INSERT INTO %i
                (postid, day, last_viewed, pageviews) VALUES (%d, %s, %s, %d)
                ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE pageviews = pageviews + %d, last_viewed = %s;",
                $data_table,
                $post_ID,
                $now,
                $now,
                $views,
                $views,
                $now
            )

$wpdb->prepare(
                "INSERT INTO %i
                (postid, pageviews, view_date, view_datetime) VALUES (%d, %d, %s, %s)
                ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE pageviews = pageviews + %d, view_datetime = %s;",
                $summary_table,
                $post_ID,
                $views,
                $curdate,
                $now,
                $views,
                $now
            )
$wpdb->prepare("ALTER TABLE %i ALTER COLUMN day DROP DEFAULT;", "{$prefix}data")
$wpdb->prepare("ALTER TABLE %i ALTER COLUMN last_viewed DROP DEFAULT;", "{$prefix}data")
$wpdb->prepare("ALTER TABLE %i CHANGE last_viewed view_datetime datetime NOT NULL, ADD KEY view_datetime (view_datetime);", "{$prefix}summary")
$wpdb->prepare("ALTER TABLE %i ALTER COLUMN view_date DROP DEFAULT;", "{$prefix}summary")
$wpdb->prepare("ALTER TABLE %i ALTER COLUMN view_datetime DROP DEFAULT;", "{$prefix}summary")

$wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT SUM(pageviews) AS pageviews FROM %i WHERE {$views_time_range} AND postid = %d;",
                $summary_table,
                $args['_postID']
            )
